seoTitle: How to Import Data in Power BI Using an API
metaDescription: Connect Power BI to an API using the Web Connector to pull real-time data into your reports, with setup and troubleshooting tips included.
intro: Pulling data from an API lets Power BI reports reflect current information straight from a live source instead of a static export. This guide covers how to use the Web Connector to import API data, from configuration through troubleshooting. It's useful for finance, e-commerce, and any team that needs dashboards updated with fresh data.

steps.heading: Set up the Web Connector
steps.body: In Power BI, choose the Web data source option as the starting point for connecting to your API.

steps.heading: Configure the API parameters
steps.body: Enter the API endpoint URL and any required parameters or authentication details so Power BI can retrieve the correct data.

steps.heading: Import the data into your report
steps.body: Complete the connection steps so the API response is loaded into Power BI and available for building visuals.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues
steps.body: If the import fails, check the endpoint URL, authentication settings, and response format, since these are the most frequent causes of connection errors.

steps.heading: Set up ongoing refreshes
steps.body: Configure your report to refresh on a schedule so the API-driven data stays current without manual re-importing.

faq.question: Does the API need authentication to connect with Power BI?
faq.answer: Many APIs do require authentication, such as a key or token, which you'll need to configure during the Web Connector setup.

faq.question: Can Power BI refresh API data automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected you can set up scheduled refreshes so the report periodically pulls updated data from the API.

faq.question: What should I do if my API import keeps failing?
faq.answer: Double-check the endpoint URL, required parameters, and authentication details, as these are the most common causes of import errors.

faq.question: Is the Web Connector only for JSON APIs?
faq.answer: It commonly handles JSON and other structured web responses, though the exact format support depends on how the API returns data.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to import data via API?
faq.answer: Basic setup doesn't require coding, though understanding the API's parameters and response structure helps when troubleshooting.
